🧪 Cursor Layout Controls - Complete Test Suite

📋 Instructions

  1. Click "Run All Tests" to execute the complete test suite
  2. Each test group will run and report results
  3. Check the Bottom Panel for detailed test output
  4. Try the menus, tabs, and controls to interact with the UI
  5. Use keyboard shortcuts (Ctrl+N, Ctrl+W, Ctrl+`, etc.)
  6. View console output in browser DevTools (F12) for detailed logs

🎯 Test Suite

Run comprehensive tests for all components:

🎮 Interactive Tests

Test individual features:

⌨️ Keyboard Shortcuts

Try these shortcuts in the editor area:

  • Ctrl+N - New Tab
  • Ctrl+W - Close Tab
  • Ctrl+` - Toggle Terminal
  • Ctrl+B - Toggle Explorer
  • Ctrl+Shift+P - Command Palette
  • Ctrl+K Ctrl+S - Keyboard Shortcuts
